meta.formula: Kho9/Kho10/Kho26 restored from last good JSON; other kho from G3_BC05A_2; Kho39 fixed TonDK+NhapTK-XuatTK; Ak suffix removed; ship names grouped for specified coal bases.
meta.note: Use last known-good JSON as danh muc base; overlay only matching quantities; do not rebuild kho/coal names from G3.
meta.kho39Fix: V167: XuatTK uses MaKho_X only, no MaDV filter
